headline: Barclays Trims Essex Property (ESS) Trust Price Target to $271 after Sector Review
summary: Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) is included among the 13 Best REIT Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 6, Barclays analyst Richard Hightower lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) to $271 from $292. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. headline: Essex Property Trust Extends Dividend Streak As Yield And Valuation Stand Out
summary: Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) has approved its 32nd consecutive annual dividend increase. The decision was announced by the Board of Directors and extends a multi decade record of dividend growth. The move highlights the company's continued focus on delivering regular cash returns to shareholders. For investors watching NYSE:ESS, the new dividend increase comes with the stock most recently closing at $255.34. Over the past 3 years the share price has returned 33.9%, and over 5 years it...
